title: Navigate to credit cards section and view available card list
steps: Navigate to https://www.americanexpress.com/
Locate and click the 'Credit Cards' navigation link
Verify the credit cards listing page loads
Verify multiple card tiles are visible on the page
expected_result: A list of available American Express credit cards is displayed with card tiles and filter options visible
kane_objective: Navigate to the credit cards section of americanexpress.com and verify a list of available credit cards is displayed

title: Filter credit cards by category (rewards, travel, cashback)
steps: Navigate to https://www.americanexpress.com/
Go to the credit cards section
Locate filter chips (e.g., Travel, Cash Back, Rewards)
Click a filter chip
Verify the card list updates to show filtered results
expected_result: Filtered credit card results are displayed below the filter chips after applying a filter
kane_objective: Navigate to the credit cards section of americanexpress.com, apply a filter such as Travel or Cash Back, and verify filtered card results appear

title: Click a credit card to view details including benefits, fees, and rewards
steps: Navigate to https://www.americanexpress.com/
Go to the credit cards section
Click on any credit card tile or 'View Details' link
Verify the card detail page loads
Verify benefits, annual fee, and rewards information is visible
expected_result: Card detail page is displayed showing benefits, annual fee, and rewards/points information
kane_objective: Navigate to the credit cards section of americanexpress.com, click on View Details for any card, and verify the card detail page shows benefits, fees, and rewards

title: View card highlights and comparison without logging in
steps: Navigate to https://www.americanexpress.com/ without logging in
Go to the credit cards section
Verify card highlights or comparison section is visible
Verify no login prompt blocks the content
expected_result: Card highlights and featured benefits are visible on the credit cards page without requiring login
kane_objective: Navigate to the credit cards section of americanexpress.com and verify card highlights or comparison information is visible without logging in

title: Search results are relevant to selected filters or criteria
steps: Navigate to https://www.americanexpress.com/
Go to the credit cards section
Apply a filter (e.g., Travel)
Verify the displayed cards are relevant to the selected filter
Check that card descriptions/labels match the filter category
expected_result: Cards shown after applying a filter are relevant to the selected category (e.g., travel cards appear when Travel filter is applied)
kane_objective: Navigate to the credit cards section of americanexpress.com, apply the Travel filter, and verify the results shown are travel-related credit cards
